queries.question: List all psychologist and also show psychiatrists associated with Harmony Wellness Center.
queries.sql:
SELECT Psychologists.name
FROM Psychologists JOIN Clinics ON Psychologists.clinic = Clinics.name
UNION
SELECT Psychiatrists.name
FROM Psychiatrists JOIN Clinics ON Psychiatrists.clinic = Clinics.name
WHERE Clinics.name = "Harmony Wellness Center"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?psychologists a :Psychologists .
    ?clinics a :Clinics .
    ?psychologists p:clinic ?clinic_l .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_r .
    ?psychologists p:name ?name .
    FILTER(STR(?clinic_l) = STR(?name_r))
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?psychiatrists a :Psychiatrists .
    ?clinics a :Clinics .
    ?psychiatrists p:clinic ?clinic_l .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_r .
    ?psychiatrists p:name ?name .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?clinic_l) = STR(?name_r))
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Harmony Wellness Center")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Display psychologists and psychiatrists affiliated with Harmony Wellness Center.
queries.sql:
SELECT Psychologists.name
FROM Psychologists JOIN Clinics ON Psychologists.clinic = Clinics.name
WHERE Clinics.name = "Harmony Wellness Center"
UNION
SELECT Psychiatrists.name
FROM Psychiatrists JOIN Clinics ON Psychiatrists.clinic = Clinics.name
WHERE Clinics.name = "Harmony Wellness Center"

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?psychologists a :Psychologists .
    ?clinics a :Clinics .
    ?psychologists p:clinic ?clinic_l .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_r .
    ?psychologists p:name ?name .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?clinic_l) = STR(?name_r))
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Harmony Wellness Center")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?psychiatrists a :Psychiatrists .
    ?clinics a :Clinics .
    ?psychiatrists p:clinic ?clinic_l .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_r .
    ?psychiatrists p:name ?name .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?clinic_l) = STR(?name_r))
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Harmony Wellness Center")

}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display psychologists and psychiatrists affiliated with Harmony Wellness Center.
